name: HillaryClinton.com
subject: Once in a lifetime chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Join Hillary on the Stronger Together plane | | As campaign trip director at HFA, Derek, my feet are barely going to touch the ground as we zoom around the country during these last 18 days. As we hop from battleground state to battleground state to talk to voters, the campaign plane is becoming the hub of this race and right now, **[you have the chance to get onboard with Hillary.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

There is nothing like being a part of a team of dedicated people working at 30,000 feet -- meetings, briefings, and surrogate sightings: Who needs an in-flight movie when you can watch history unfold before your eyes? **[Add your name before midnight tomorrow for the chance to experience the ride of your life.](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I’m all about logistics, so here’s the deal: Depending on our itinerary that day, we might pick you up or you might join us in New York. Then you’ll ride the plane, meet Hillary, take some photos, check out America from the skies, and then join us at whatever event we’re off to that day.

The plane is pretty big, but the manifest stays small: It’s just Hillary, a group of small traveling staff, and some members of the press. But for one trip only, we’ll save two seats for you and a guest.

**I’m so excited to meet you, Derek, and make sure your trip’s a good one. Add your name before midnight tomorrow to be entered:** [](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
See you onboard!

Connolly

Connolly Keigher
Trip Director
Hillary for America

|
**Chip in $1 to be automatically entered to win a trip on the "Stronger Together" plane:**
| [

---

**No purchase, payment, contribution, signing up to receive text messages, or signing up to volunteer is necessary to win, and will not improve chances of winning.**

Void where prohibited. Entries must be received between 12:00 p.m. (all times Eastern) on 10/20/16 and 11:59 p.m. on 10/22/16. Enter by visiting [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to donate to Hillary for America or visit [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter by signing up to volunteer for Hillary for America. Text PLANE to 47246 to enter by signing up to receive periodic text messages from Hillary for America. Msg&data; rates apply. Text HELP for help & STOP to cancel. Visit [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to enter for free, without contributing, signing up to volunteer, or opting-in to receive text messages. One (1) winner will receive an invitation for winner and one (1) guest to take a ride on the official campaign plane with Hillary Clinton; airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to the New York area where they will board the campaign plane; one (1) night hotel accommodations for winner and winner’s guest in New York; airline tickets for winner and winner’s guest to return home from the final flight destination (approx. value of Prizes: $3500). Odds of winning depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens or residents of the 50 states, DC or Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). All prizes awarded. Promotion subject to Official Rules [here](https://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjY4NjA2MjAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=OTAzOTI4NTYyS0&mt=1&rt=0) and additional restrictions on eligibility. subject: Thirty years ago today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
President Reagan took bold action to save our American economy, and so will I. |

Friend, “I feel like we just played the Word Series of tax reform... and the American people won!” That quote is from Ronald Reagan, in his address to the nation when he signed his second sweeping tax reform package into law – on October 22, 1986. That’s right - today we celebrate the 30th anniversary of this historic act, which put our country on a path to a generation of incredible prosperity. As President of the United States I will lead boldly to achieve amazing American economic strength, just like my political hero Ronald Reagan did. It’s exactly what the Trump tax plan is all about – it’s time to empower our people and our economy again. Honor the 30th anniversary of Ronald Reagan’s 1986 tax cut, by JOINING Team Trump with a $30 special contribution to help me WIN and cut taxes. I SUPPORT TRUMP TAX REFORM President Reagan’s 1986 reform package cut personal and business tax rates, and greatly simplified a completely out-of-control tax code. But over the last three decades its positive effects have been eroded by subsequent tax hikes, bad trade deals made by incompetent career politicians, and regulations that stifle economic activity in our country. That’s why I have proposed a bold and aggressive tax plan to jumpstart our American economy. This is what I will do: Simplify the tax code, with big relief for middle-class families; Reduce the corporate tax rate from 35 percent to 15 percent, making it one of the best in the world, to bring back millions of jobs; Close many loopholes currently available to corporations and wealthy individuals; Get rid of the death tax, so our people can pass down their wealth to their children and grandchildren instead of handing it over to the federal government. But first I need your help to WIN – with just 17 days until Election Day I need you on board more than ever before. It’s now or never, and believe me, none of this will ever happen with Crooked Hillary Clinton in the White House. It will be four more years of Barack Obama’s disastrous failed economic policies, and worse. Follow this link to JOIN Team Trump with a $30 special contribution today, or any other amount, to help us close out this election strong and win. Best wishes, Donald J. Trump P.S. Today marks the 30th anniversary of President Reagan’s 1986 Tax Reform Act – and I am determined to WIN so we can empower our people and our economy again. My bold and aggressive tax plan will do just that, and it will be one of the top legislative priorities in a Trump White House. JOIN today to help me Make America Great Again! I SUPPORT TRUMP TAX REFORM

name: Rob Portman
subject: Off to Toledo!
body:
| Peter,

We just kicked off our final Super Saturday day of grassroots action in Columbus, and now we're in the campaign RV headed to Toledo!

Jane and I are traveling across Ohio today meeting with volunteers and interns as we work toward our goal of contacting 150,000 targeted voters in a single day. Just today, we're making stops in Columbus, Toledo, Dayton, West Chester, Terrace Park, Brecksville, Akron, Canton, and Athens. Today's events mark the start of our "Countdown to Victory" RV tour which will have 80 stops across 4,000 miles over the next two weeks.

We've contacted 4.8 million voters over the past two years as we've built an unrivaled grassroots program -- and we are well on our way to beating our goal of contacting 5 million targeted voters over the course of this campaign thanks to our incredible interns and volunteers.

In just over two weeks, Ohio voters will have a clear choice between moving forward with our pro-growth policies for better wages and more jobs, or returning to Ted Strickland's failed policies of higher taxes, more regulations, and bigger government.

Thank you for your support, and we hope to see you soon on our "Countdown to Victory" RV Tour!

All best,
Rob Portman [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_oct_1&n=1)[](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Ftwitter.com%2Frobportman&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ss_oct_1&n=2)[

body:
It’s Time to Drain the Swamp in Washington, D.C. |

Friend, The unbelievable climate of corruption in our nation’s capital -- the special interests, foreign and domestic, which ensnare politicians like quicksand -- must be ended once and for all. Our political system is rotted from the inside-out, Friend. It’s high time we drained the swamp in Washington, D.C. -- and with your indispensable support, WE WILL. It’s Time to Drain the Swamp in Washington, D.C. Support Donald Trump for President TODAY. That’s why I’m proposing a package of ethics reforms to make our government honest once again: First: I am going to re-institute a 5-year ban on all executive branch officials lobbying the government after they leave government service. I am going to ask Congress to pass this ban into law so that it cannot be lifted by executive order. Second: I am going to ask Congress to institute its own 5-year ban on lobbying by former members of Congress and their staffs. Third: I am going to expand the definition of lobbyist so we close all the loopholes that former government officials use by labeling themselves consultants and advisors when we all know they are lobbyists. Fourth: I am going to issue a lifetime ban against senior executive branch officials lobbying on behalf of a foreign government. Fifth: I am going to ask Congress to pass a campaign finance reform that prevents registered foreign lobbyists from raising money in American elections. Not only will we end our government corruption, but we will end the economic stagnation that is crippling our American employment, prosperity, and entrepreneurial spirit. It’s Time to Drain the Swamp in Washington, D.C. Support Donald Trump for President TODAY. Friend, we have no choice -- we must reassert control over our Government of the People and end the rot in Washington, D.C. But to get the chance, I must have your difference-making support NOW. Election Day is now just 17 days away, early voting has already started in many states, and our window of opportunity to reach out and earn the support of new Trump voters is disappearing rapidly. Help me become your President and save our government and country from the corrupt politicians, special interests, and lobbyists who poison the process and rig the results -- make an immediate contribution of $25, $50, $75, or even $100 or more today -- and then mark my words: we will drain the Washington, D.C. swamp for good. Sincerely, Donald J. Trump P.S. -- Friend, like the breeding grounds for disease-carrying vermin, Washington, D.C. must be purged of the corruption which ensnares politicians and cripples our freedom and prosperity. Will you help me “Drain the Swamp”? Do that today -- support my fight now. Thanks again, Donald. It’s Time to Drain the Swamp in Washington, D.C. Support Donald Trump for President TODAY.

Contributions to the Trump Make America Great Again Committee are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

And he knows that's exactly what she'll keep doing if she joins him in the U.S. Senate.
Corporate special interests have spent $47 MILLION to keep Maggie from winning because they know that she's a real champion for progress and that if she wins in New Hampshire, Democrats will take the Senate. **[That's why we're asking you to join Bernie Sanders and give $3 or what you can now so that we can overcome the corporate special interest spending and make progress for our families in the Senate.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdb26/2a380d31/17c7976c/fc2272/3436044810/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX3Nlbl9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMTYxMDIyX0Jlcm5pZS1Mb25nX25oLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_sen_email?refcode=e20161022_Bernie-Long_nh-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")**

Unfortunately, all of the money corporate special interests are spending is having an effect -- the majority of recent polls have shown us locked in a dead heat. Grassroots donors like you are the only people who can help move us ahead.

clean_body: "" "" When Bernie Sanders endorsed Governor Hassan, it was a proud moment for this campaign. We all know that Bernie is a stalwart for progress, and that he's driven by principle, not politics. His stamp of approval really means something. He sees what Maggie has done in Vermont's neighboring New Hampshire -- she froze college tuition, expanded Medicaid, and protected women's health care. At every turn she's fought for the economic well-being of middle class families and stood up for progress. And he knows that's exactly what she'll keep doing if she joins him in the U.S. Senate. Corporate special interests have spent $47 MILLION to keep Maggie from winning because they know that she's a real champion for progress and that if she wins in New Hampshire, Democrats will take the Senate. "" We all know that the system is rigged for the special interests and that they're scared of what Bernie, Maggie, and other progressive leaders like Elizabeth Warren can achieve together if Democrats take back the majority. Unlike Bernie and Maggie, our opponent, Washington Republican Kelly Ayotte, doesn't want Citizens United overturned, so the dark money groups intent on buying this election would love her to stay in the Senate to rubber-stamp their agenda. Unfortunately, all of the money corporate special interests are spending is having an effect -- the majority of recent polls have shown us locked in a dead heat. Grassroots donors like you are the only people who can help move us ahead. We're running out of time here, and we really need you to join us to push back on all of this outside spending, elect Maggie, and take back the Senate for progressives. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" -- Team Maggie ""

subject: These senators don't deserve accolades now >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b48/24c69fd9/c32d14e/18ea17fc/2743956314/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFEV61N_digital_email_20161022_WontForget_n-all&source=WPEFEV61N_digital_email_20161022_WontForget_n-all")
---

| | Hi there,

It's astounding what some senators think they can get away with this year.

After months and months supporting Donald Trump and his hate-fueled campaign, a handful of Republicans are defecting after video emerged of Trump bragging about sexual assault.

As offensive as the video is, it's not any different from what we've known about Trump this whole time. It's the same Trump who said about women: "You have to treat 'em like shit" back in 1992, and the same Trump who fueled the birther movement by trying to convince people that President Obama wasn't born in America.

Republican senators who are pulling their support now don't deserve accolades for their condemnation of Trump -- and they certainly don't deserve to win in November.

Trump's behavior has been consistently unacceptable, and women won't forget the Republicans who supported him along the way.

**[Donate $3 to help defeat the Republicans who stood with Donald Trump and replace them with pro-choice Democratic women.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b48/24c69fd9/c32d14e/18ea17fd/2743956314/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161022_email_WontForget?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+defeat+the+Republicans+&utm_campaign=WPEFEV61N_digital_email_20161022_WontForget_n-all&source=WPEFEV61N_digital_email_20161022_WontForget_n-all")**

Just this month New Hampshire Senator Kelly Ayotte said Trump was "absolutely" a role model for children. After the video of Trump came out she pulled her support, but it was too little, too late. So we're doubling down to make sure Maggie Hassan can beat Ayotte in November.

After Donald Trump attacked a Gold Star family, Arizona Senator John McCain didn't bat an eye. It wasn't until the video that he rescinded his endorsement. He doesn't get a free pass now. Ann Kirkpatrick can win this seat, but she needs the full support of this community if she's going to come out ahead.

Trump called women "fat pigs" and even implied that a debate moderator was asking him tough questions because of her period. And none of that phased Nevada Republican Joe Heck. It was only when he realized he couldn't lose Latino voters AND women in Nevada that he pulled his support. We're more fired up than ever to help Catherine Cortez Masto win that Senate seat.

Women won't forget what these senators and candidates stand for, and women will win. **Donate $3 to help Maggie, Ann, Catherine, and our other candidates defeat these Republicans in November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Women-Will-Win](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c0b48/24c69fd9/c32d14e/18ea17fe/2743956314/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161022_email_WontForget?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgWomenWillWin&utm_campaign=WPEFEV61N_digital_email_20161022_WontForget_n-all&source=WPEFEV61N_digital_email_20161022_WontForget_n-all")**

Thank you,

Marcy Stech
Vice President of Communications, EMILY's List
